channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Blue Specialized, black Dutch bike, 24th May
item.description:
Both abandoned, unbridgeable. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 312, Seven Sisters Road, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing contents spread into street and neighbouring property, 24th May
item.description:
This bin is not big enough for the amount of food and dog waste deposited, it regularly overflows and rubbish is pulled out by foxes and magpies and dragged onto Charing Court grass and car park. A bigger free standing bin with a covered top as seen in the High St would be more hygienic I have reported this before

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bin, 24th May
item.description:
Graffiti on the green cycle store.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Hayles Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Beer boxes, broken glass, 24th May
item.description:
Regular remains of asb which I can’t keep trying to clean up. Empty boxes for beer, beer bottles, lids, cans, and lots of broken glass on a regular basis. On the public footpath at top of scrubbs farm, SSSI site. Often burnt out bikes/bike parts, and tree burnt too. Teens meet there on bikes. As well as clean up needed can the area be regularly checked by park warden or local police?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Gravel Road, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ELime bikes Park dangerously on the pavement, 24th May
item.description:
ELime bikes Park dangerously on the pavement might hurt somebody. Whitcomb street next to TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Leicester Square, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on TfL cabinet, 24th May
item.description:
Graffiti on a black TfL cabinet on the pavement. The cabinet is covered in white spray paint tags. Located near Briant House on Hercules Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hercules Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 7 clarence rd nw6 7tg, 24th May
item.description:
Bar stoo fly tipped by the hmo residents

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Bags of domestic rubbish on the pavement, 24th May
item.description:
It's been there for a day or so and the stench of rotting food is becoming unpleasant
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hedge Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Growing Pothole on Hatherley Crescent, 24th May
item.description:
Pothole has been growing for months, bikes must swerve into road to avoid.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th May
item.description:
Two mattresses have been dumped on the green space on the corner of Castlecombe Road and Beaconsfield Road. Have been there two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castlecombe Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree, 24th May
item.description:
The tree outside 5 springdale road looks dead.. all the others have leaves. this one is bare..
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

...

item.title: High Holborn, pavement at junction with Southampton Place. In front of Farmer J, 24th May
item.description:
High Holborn, pavement at junction with Southampton Place. In front of Farmer J Bollard broken and 3 cycle stands broken from vehicle impact

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Place, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2cars been left on road with flat tyres, 24th May
item.description:
The two vehicles CY58FOD and NG62MDE seem to have been left for at least 4 months and have not been moved and are now with flat tyres on both and are making the area look unsightly .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Raymere Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

Please investigate
